ops.title: Propagate autoUpdate to user-global ~/.claude/settings.json
ops.description: Add "autoUpdate": true to the 8 extraKnownMarketplaces entries missing it in ~/.claude/settings.json: cc-transcript, claude-code-lsps, revdiff, skills, slop-cop, cc-notes, railway-skills, cc-context (captain-hook is not registered globally — do not add it). Targeted edit preserving key order and formatting.

ops.text: jq '.extraKnownMarketplaces | map_values(.autoUpdate)' ~/.claude/settings.json returns true for every entry
